zy.t: abbr. 区域业务代表；中国渔检；中医药行业标准

zydeco.t: n. 柴迪科舞[曲](美国一种黑人舞曲)(亦作zodico, zologo)
zydeco.d: n. music of southern Louisiana that combines French dance melodies with Caribbean music and blues

zygal.t:
a. H形的
[医] 轭状的

zygapophyses.t: n. 椎骨之关节突( zygapophysis的名词复数 )

zygapophysis.t:
n. 脊椎关节突
[医] 椎骨关节突
zygapophysis.d:
n. One of the articular processes of a vertebra, of
   which there are usually four, two anterior and two posterior. See under
   Vertebra.

zyglo.t: 荧光探伤器, 荧光透视法

zygnema.t: [网络] 双星藻属；变星藻；和转板藻属

zygnemataceae.d: n. pond scums: common freshwater algae forming green slimy masses

zygnematales.t: [网络] 双星藻目；l双星藻目；邧陎婍醴

zygobranchiate.d: a. Of or pertaining to the Zygobranchia.

zygocactus.d: n small genus of Brazilian cacti having flat fleshy usually branched joints and showy red or pink flowers followed by red fleshy fruits

zygocactus truncatus.t: [网络] 蟹爪兰；螃蟹仙人掌；圣诞仙人掌是螃蟹仙人掌属

zygodactyl.t:
a. 对趾的
n. 对趾鸟
zygodactyl.d: a. (of bird feet) having the first and fourth toes directed backward the second and third forward

zygodactylous.t:
[鸟]对趾鸟
a. (=zygodactyl)前后有双趾的
zygodactylous.d:
a. Yoke-footed; having the toes disposed in pairs; --
   applied to birds which have two toes before and two behind, as the
   parrot, cuckoo, woodpecker, etc.

zygoma.t:
n. 颊骨, 颧骨, 颞骨突起
[医] 颧骨; 颧弓
zygoma.d: n. the slender arch formed by the temporal process of the cheekbone that bridges to the zygomatic process of the temporal bone

zygomatic.t:
a. 颊骨的, 颧骨的
[医] 颧的, 颧骨的
zygomatic.d: a. of or relating to the cheek region of the face

zygomatic reflex.t: [医] 颧反射, 下颌反射

zygomaticosphenoid fissure.t: [医] 颧蝶裂(蝶骨大翼与颧骨间裂)

zygomorphic.d: a. capable of division into symmetrical halves by only one longitudinal plane passing through the axis

zygomorphous.d: a capable of division into symmetrical halves by only one longitudinal plane passing through the axis

zygomycetes.d: n. class of fungi coextensive with subdivision Zygomycota

zygomycota.t: [网络] 接合菌门；接合菌类；接合菌门真菌

zygomycotina.t: [网络] 接合菌亚门；接合菌亚门真菌；接合亚门

zygophore.t: [植]接合菌囊柄, 接合子梗

zygophyllaceae.d: n small trees, shrubs, and herbs of warm arid and saline regions; often resinous; some poisonous: genera Zygophyllum, Tribulus, Guaiacum, Larrea

zygophyllum fabago.t: [网络] 驼蹄瓣；骆驼蹄草；脶磲癯铣萘

zygosis.t:
n. 接合
[医] 接合(单细胞生物)

zygosperm.d:
n. A spore formed by the union of the contents of two
   similar cells, either of the same or of distinct individual plants.
   Zygosperms are found in certain orders of algae and fungi.

zygosphene.d:
n. A median process on the front part of the neural arch
   of the vertebrae of most snakes and some lizards, which fits into a
   fossa, called the zygantrum, on the back part of the arch in front.

zygospore.t:
n. 接合孢子
[医] 接合孢子
zygospore.d: n. a plant spore formed by two similar sexual cells

zygostates.t: [法] 过磅员, 鉴定钱币含量的官员

zygotactic.t: 相对性别接合子梗间互趋性的

zygote.t:
n. 合子, 受精卵
[医] 合子
zygote.d: n. (genetics) the diploid cell resulting from the union of a haploid spermatozoon and ovum (including the organism that develops from that cell)

zygotene.t: n. [生](细胞减数分裂前期的)偶线期,合线期
zygotene.d: n the second stage of the prophase of meiosis

zygotes.t:
(zygote 的复数) n. 合子, 受精卵
[医] 合子
zygotes.d:
plural of zygote
n. (genetics) the diploid cell resulting from the union of a haploid spermatozoon and ovum (including the organism that develops from that cell)

zygotic.d: a of or relating to a zygote

zygotropism.t: 配子相吸引, 趋接合性

zyl.t: abbr. Sylhet, Bangladesh 孟加拉国，锡尔赫特机场（代码）

zyma.t: 曲霉菌酶、胰酶复合制剂(助消化药)

zymase.d: n. a complex of enzymes that cause glycolysis; originally found in yeast but also present in higher organisms

zyme.t:
n. 酶, 病菌
[化] 酶
zyme.d:
n. A ferment.
n. The morbific principle of a zymotic disease.

zymic.t:
a. 酶的, 酵母的
[医] 酶的
zymic.d:
a. Pertaining to, or produced by, fermentation; -- formerly, by
   confusion, used to designate lactic acid.

zymigen.t: 消化酵素, 维生素 A、B、B1、B2、B12、C, D、磷酸氢钙复合制剂(促进小儿发育的)

zymogen.t:
n. 酶原, 发酵性细菌
[化] 酶原
zymogen.d: n any of a group of compounds that are inactive precursors of enzymes and require some change (such as the hydrolysis of a fragment that masks an active enzyme) to become active

zymogenic.t:
a. 产生酶原的, 发酵的, 酶原的
[医] 发酵的, 引起发酵的
zymogenic.d:
a. Pertaining to, or formed by, a zymogene.
a. Capable of producing a definite zymogen or ferment.

zymogens.t:
(zymogen 的复数) n. 酶原, 发酵性细菌
[化] 酶原
zymogens.d:
plural of zymogen
n any of a group of compounds that are inactive precursors of enzymes and require some change (such as the hydrolysis of a fragment that masks an active enzyme) to become active

zymogic.t: [医] 发酵的, 引起发酵的

zymohexase.t: 醛缩酶, 醛醇缩合酶

zymoid.t: a. 酵母的, 像酵母或酵素的

zymolite.t: [医] 酶作用物, 基质, 底质

zymological.d: a. Of or pertaining to zymology.

zymologist.t:
n. 发酵学者
[医] 酶学家
zymologist.d:
n. One who is skilled in zymology, or in the fermentation
   of liquors.

zymology.t:
n. 酶学, 发酵学
[医] 酶学
zymology.d: n. the branch of chemistry concerned with fermentation (as in making wine or brewing or distilling)

zymolysis.t:
n. 发酵, 酶解(作用)
[化] 酶解; 酶解作用; 发酵
zymolysis.d: n a process in which an agent causes an organic substance to break down into simpler substances; especially, the anaerobic breakdown of sugar into alcohol

zymolytic.t:
a. 发酵, 酶解(作用)
[医] 酶分解的, 酶解的
zymolytic.d: a of or relating to or causing fermentation

zymome.d:
n. A glutinous substance, insoluble in alcohol, resembling
   legumin; -- now called vegetable fibrin, vegetable albumin, or gluten
   casein.

zymometer.t:
n. 发酵计, 发酵检验器
[医] 发酵检验器

zymonema albicans.t: [医] 白色酵丝菌, 白色念珠菌

zymonema capsulatum.t: [医] 荚膜酵丝菌, 皮炎芽生菌

zymonematosis.t: [医] 酵丝菌病, 芽生菌病

zymonic acid.t:
[化] 酵酮酸
[医] 酵酮酸

zymoplastic.t: a. 形成酵素的, 凝血的, 形成凝血酵素的

zymoplastic substance.t: [医] 凝血致活酶, 凝血激酶

zymoscope.t:
n. 发酵力计
[医] 发酵测定器

zymosimeter.t: 发酵计, 发酵检验器, 发酵能力测定器
zymosimeter.d:
n. An instrument for ascertaining the degree of
   fermentation occasioned by the mixture of different liquids, and the
   degree of heat which they acquire in fermentation.

zymosis.t:
n. 发酵, 发酵作用, 发酵病
[医] 发酵, 发酵病, 传染病
zymosis.d:
n. a process in which an agent causes an organic substance to break down into simpler substances; especially, the anaerobic breakdown of sugar into alcohol
n. (medicine) the development and spread of an infectious disease (especially one caused by a fungus)

zymosis gastrica.t: [医] 胃发酵[病], 胃有机酸过多

zymosterol.t:
n. 酵母甾醇
[化] 酵母甾醇

zymotachegraph.t: 酵母发面能力测定计(测定发酵的面团所产生的气体和气体量的仪器)

zymotechnics.t: n. 发酵法, 酿造法

zymotechnique.t: 发酵工艺, 发酵法, 酿造法

zymotic.t:
a. 发酵的, 引起发酵的, 发酵病的
[医] 发酵的, 发酵病的, 传染病的
zymotic.d:
a. of or relating to or causing fermentation
a. relating to or caused by infection

zymurgy.t:
n. 酿造学
[医] 酿造术, 酿造学
zymurgy.d: n the branch of chemistry concerned with fermentation (as in making wine or brewing or distilling)

zyosingan.t: 大黄、牵牛子、甘遂复合煎剂

zysbena.t: 胱胺酸、盐酸苯海拉明复合制剂(抗过敏药)

zyscal.t: 胱胺酸、氯化钙复合制剂(抗过敏药)

zytase.t: 木聚糖酶, 木糖胶酶

zythum.d:
n. A kind of ancient malt beverage; a liquor made from malt
   and wheat.
